zh.lifeSummary: 當Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele於1160年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫艾可薩阿爾德時，她的母親Hildegarde DE SCHELDERODE-DE MELLE30歲，父親Louis DE HERZELLES-D'INGHEN22歲。她於大約1179年與Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫海爾澤勒結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1222年在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫尼諾福享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele于1160年出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫艾可薩阿爾德时，她的母亲Hildegarde DE SCHELDERODE-DE MELLE30岁，父亲Louis DE HERZELLES-D'INGHEN22岁。她于大约1179年与Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫海爾澤勒结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1222年在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫尼諾福享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Claire
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Clara .  It was introduced to Britain by the Normans, but subsequently abandoned. This spelling was revived in the 19th century as a variant of   Clare .

variants.name: Clair
meanings: form of   Clara .  It was introduced to Britain by the Normans, but subsequently abandoned. This spelling was revived in the 19th century as a variant of   Clare .

en.lifeSummary: When Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele was born in 1160, in Eksaarde, East Flanders, Belgium, her mother, Hildegarde DE SCHELDERODE-DE MELLE, was 30 and her father, Louis DE HERZELLES-D'INGHEN, was 22. She married Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V about 1179, in Herzele, East Flanders, Belgium. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1222, in Ninove, East Flanders, Belgium, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele est née en 1160, à Eksaarde, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, sa mère, Hildegarde DE SCHELDERODE-DE MELLE, avait 30 ans et son père, Louis DE HERZELLES-D'INGHEN, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V environ 1179, à Herzele, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1222, à Ninove, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele 1160 in Eksaarde, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihre Mutter Hildegarde DE SCHELDERODE-DE MELLE 30 und ihr Vater Louis DE HERZELLES-D'INGHEN 22. Sie hat um 1179 in Herzele, Ostflandern, Belgien Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1222 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Ninove, Ostflandern, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele è nata il nel 1160 nel Eksaarde, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, sua madre, Hildegarde DE SCHELDERODE-DE MELLE, aveva 30 anni e sua padre, Louis DE HERZELLES-D'INGHEN, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V circa 1179, nel Herzele, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1222, nel Ninove, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzeleが1160年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンエクサアルドで生まれた時，母Hildegarde DE SCHELDERODE-DE MELLEは30歳，父Louis DE HERZELLES-D'INGHENは22歳であった。約1179年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンハーズエルでRasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE Vと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1222年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンニノブで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele(이)가 1160년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 크사아르드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 어머니 Hildegarde DE SCHELDERODE-DE MELLE(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 아버지 Louis DE HERZELLES-D'INGHEN(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1179년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 허즈일에서 Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1222년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 니노브에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele nasceu em 1160, em Eksaarde, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, sua mãe, Hildegarde DE SCHELDERODE-DE MELLE, tinha 30 anos e seu pai, Louis DE HERZELLES-D'INGHEN, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V aproximadamente 1179, em Herzele, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1222, em Ninove, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele родилась в 1160 г. в местности эксаард, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, её матери по имени Hildegarde DE SCHELDERODE-DE MELLE было 30 лет, а отцу, которого звали Louis DE HERZELLES-D'INGHEN, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V около 1179 г. в местности хирзель, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1222 г. в местности нинов, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele nació en 1160, en Eksaarde, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su mamá, Hildegarde DE SCHELDERODE-DE MELLE, tenía 30 años y su papá, Louis DE HERZELLES-D'INGHEN, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V aproximadamente 1179, en Herzele, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1222, en Ninove, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, a la edad de 62 años.
